full_text:
Li Shao 李邵
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Li Shao (李邵)was born in Henei. His move from his home in Yewang destabilised the area. Planned to defect to Gongsun Zan. Li Shao was affiliated with the Han Dynasty and Yuan Shao.
